headline: 2 Reasons to Like OXY and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Occidental Petroleum has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 27.3%. The stock now trades at $54.46, marking a 33.1% gain. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: All You Need to Know About Occidental (OXY) Rating Upgrade to Strong Buy
summary: Occidental (OXY) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

headline: S&P 500 Eases On Iran Ceasefire Jitters, Crude Soars To $90: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks gave up early gains Tuesday as oil jumped nearly 3%. UnitedHealth surged 8% on strong earnings.

headline: Tom Lee Called the Market Bounce With Surgical Precision — These Sectors Have Gas in the Tank
summary: You have to give credit where credit is due. With Fundstrat’s top strategist, Tom Lee, now looking like a genius for his bold call of a market bottom (and bounce to follow) just a few weeks ago, when it seemed like the war in Iran would cause the return of a bear market, I do ... headline: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading higher as crude prices jump amid uncertainty over whether the U.S. and Iran will hold peace talks before the ceasefire expires on April 22, raising the risk of renewed conflict.
